description: Example: technical-document claim provisionally admitted. All evidence requirements are met but source trust is below the minimum ('low' < 'medium'). The claim is admitted with conditions and must be re-verified. Maps to Decision.ALLOW_WITH_CONTEXT in the canonical ABI.

conditions: Source trust must be elevated to 'medium' or above before this claim is treated as authoritative.

policyDecision.reason: Claim 'claim-td-prov-001' is provisionally admitted. Source trust 'low' is below the minimum 'medium'. This admission is provisional and subject to re-verification.
policyDecision.remediation: Elevate the source trust level before treating this claim as authoritative. Record the claim status as 'provisional' in the claim registry and schedule re-verification.

note: admissionDecision='provisional' maps to decision='allow_with_context' in the canonical sourceos.guardrail.decision.v0.1 ABI.
